metadata.title: ConstitutionalViolationPayload — IntentGuard violation serialization envelope
metadata.notes: Governs the shape of ConstitutionalViolationError.to_dict() as persisted into proposal.execution_results. The top-level 'error' key preserves the legacy flat-string for older readers; 'violations' carries the structured list for diagnostic triage without live daemon probes.

error.description: Legacy flat-string form: 'Blocked by IntentGuard: {primary_message}'. Preserved for backward compatibility with downstream handlers that read data['error'].

blocked_by.description: Always 'IntentGuard'. Identifies the enforcement component that produced this payload.

violation_count.description: Number of ViolationReport instances in the violations list.

violations.description: Structured list of per-violation dicts. Each entry mirrors ViolationReport fields serialized to primitives only — no nested dataclasses.

rule_name.description: Rule identifier that was violated. Corresponds to rule_id in the Finding nucleus.

path.description: Repo-relative file path where the violation occurred.

source_policy.description: Policy file that declared the violated rule.

suggested_fix.description: Optional remediation guidance. Default empty string.
